description:
When password changing enforce the module to set the new password to the one
provided by a previously stacked password module
ocil_clause: Usage of use_authtok for pam_unix.so is required
ocil:
To verify the password reuse setting is compliant, run the following command: 
$ grep use_authtok /etc/pam.d/common-password
The output should show use_authtok on the line.
fixtext:
To configure the use_authtok option for the pam_unix PAM modules, in the file /etc/pam.d/common-password, append use_authtok to the line which refers to the pam_unix.so, as shown below: 
password [success=1 default=ignore] pam_unix.so ...existing_options... use_authtok
title: Require use_authtok for pam_unix.so
